title: stenia calceolaris
intro: Stenia calceolaris, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is also known as the slipper orchid. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it a potential candidate for the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stenia calceolaris include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Stenia calceolaris typically involve the extraction of its roots and leaves, which can be used to create infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
